description: Synthetic (mood, date, profile) triples for the mood-faithfulness eval. Each item carries a one-sentence user profile and a `relationship` flag describing how the profile relates to the mood: 'adjacent' (profile points at a neighboring food region), 'contrast' (profile is intentionally adversarial), or 'aligned' (profile reinforces the mood -- sanity check that we don't break the easy case).

tag_definitions.high-signal-cuisine: Mood maps clearly to a dish type or cuisine (noodles, pizza, soup).
tag_definitions.high-signal-attribute: Mood maps to a clear attribute filter (spicy, hearty, low-carb).
tag_definitions.cross-cutting: Combination of cuisine and attribute, or a regional cuisine cue (Italian, Asian flavors).
tag_definitions.vague: Under-specified; tests whether the system adds value over literal matching.

relationship_definitions.adjacent: Profile and mood point at related-but-not-overlapping food regions (e.g., profile = spicy Korean, mood = noodles). Reproduces the demo bug shape -- realistic user behavior.
relationship_definitions.contrast: Profile is the opposite of the mood. Worst-case stress test for blend dilution; if the system can't honor mood here, the blend strategy is fundamentally broken.
relationship_definitions.aligned: Profile reinforces the mood. Should trivially hit 3/3 -- guards against fixes that 'over-correct' and break the easy case.

items.profile: I love spicy Korean food -- kimchi stews and grilled meats.

I gravitate toward Mediterranean food -- hummus, grilled lamb, and roasted vegetables.

I love grilled meats and roasted vegetables -- usually dry, hearty plates.
I love Mediterranean food -- falafel, hummus, and grilled lamb.
I love rich Italian comfort food -- creamy pastas and cheesy bakes.
I love grain bowls with light dressings and lots of vegetables.
I always order the same grilled chicken Caesar salad.
I love bold spicy Indian curries and rich saucy dishes.
I love Italian food -- pasta, pizza, and risotto.
I love hot saucy entrees -- pastas, curries, and stews.
I love grilled chicken and steak -- not really a fish person.
I love hearty Italian pasta dishes and crusty bread.
I love Mexican food -- tacos, salsas, and rice and beans.
I love Mediterranean food -- falafel, hummus, and grilled lamb.
I love East Asian flavors -- stir-fries, ramen, and rice bowls.
I love Italian pasta dishes and wood-fired pizza.
I love hearty Italian dinners -- lasagna, risotto, and meatballs.
I love light salads and steamed grain bowls.
I love East Asian flavors -- sushi, ramen, and stir-fries.
I love elaborate multi-course meals -- soup, salad, entree, dessert.
I love hearty Italian comfort food -- lasagna and risotto.
I love hearty dinner entrees -- steak, pasta, and roasts.
I love clean lean meals -- grilled fish, salads, and vegetables.
I love soft, slow-cooked dishes -- braises and stews.

I love grilled proteins and salads -- usually skip bread and rice.
I'm strictly carnivore -- only grilled meats, no starches, no carbs of any kind.

I never eat liquid foods with my meal -- always dry, solid plates.
I dislike all Latin American cuisine -- I only eat East Asian food.
I'm a minimalist eater -- only light, raw, whole foods like fresh fruit and vegetables.
I love noodle dishes of all kinds -- pasta, ramen, pho, lo mein, udon.
I love Italian food -- pizza, pasta, antipasti, and bruschetta.
